output.rationale: Same test has failed 7 times in 7 days, known experimentation pipeline lag. This is a recurring transient issue handled by the experimentation team.

decision_log.decision: Classified as recurring_transient based on failure pattern
decision_log.rationale: 7 consecutive failures in 7 days with no self-resolution. The test monitors participation data consistency which is known to lag. This matches the recurring_transient pattern — a known issue that doesn't require AE on-call intervention.
alternatives_considered: flaky_test — but this is consistent failure, not intermittent
